extraction.description: This screenshot shows the Explorer panel in UiPath Studio Web for a solution named "Billing Assistent." Inside the solution, a "Conversational Agent" component is expanded, revealing its sections: Definition, Evaluation Sets, and Evaluators. The solution name and the Conversational Agent node are visually highlighted.
extraction.step_instructions: 1. In the Explorer panel, locate the solution named "Billing Assistent." 2. Expand or select the "Conversational Agent" node. 3. Click on "Definition" to continue configuring the conversational agent.
